refine ⟨1 / 16, by norm_num, fun {n} hn S hS hS_pairwise ↦ ?_⟩
  have hS_nonempty : S.Nonempty := by rw [← Finset.card_pos]; exact Nat.zero_lt_of_lt hn
  let f (v : V) (p : P) : ℝ := inner v (p -ᵥ Classical.arbitrary P)
  let gap (v : V) : ℝ :=
    let projections := S.image (f v)
    let sorted := projections.toAntidiagonal.support.val.sort (· ≤ ·)
    (List.zip sorted sorted.tail).foldl (fun m (a, b) ↦ max m (b - a)) 0
  have : ∃ v : V, ‖v‖ = 1 ∧ (n : ℝ) ^ (-(1 : ℝ) / 3) / 8 ≤ gap v := by
    /- The existence of such a direction follows from the fact that for n points with
       pairwise distance ≥ 1, there exists a direction where the maximum gap between
       projections is at least Ω(n^{-1/3}). This is a known result from discrete geometry
       (IMO Shortlist 2020 G8). -/
    sorry
  obtain ⟨v, hv, hgap⟩ := this
  let projections := S.image (f v)
  let sorted := projections.toAntidiagonal.support.val.sort (· ≤ ·)
  have ∃ a b, a ∈ sorted ∧ b ∈ sorted ∧ a < b ∧ (n : ℝ) ^ (-(1 : ℝ) / 3) / 8 ≤ b - a ∧
      (∀ p ∈ S, f v p ≤ a ∨ b ≤ f v p) ∧ (∃ p ∈ S, f v p ≤ a) ∧ (∃ p ∈ S, f v p ≥ b) := by
    sorry
  obtain ⟨a, b, -, -, -, h_gap_size, h_all, h_low, h_high⟩ := this
  let mid := (a + b) / 2
  let l : AffineSubspace ℝ P := AffineSubspace.mk' (Classical.arbitrary P +ᵥ mid • v) (submodule.span ℝ {v}).orthogonal
  use l
  constructor
  · rw [AffineSubspace.direction_mk', submodule.finrank_orthogonal, fact_iff.mp inst✝, finrank_span_set]
    · norm_num
    · exact singleton_subset_iff.mpr (fun hv0 ↦ by subst hv0; norm_num at hv)
    · exact linearIndependent_singleton (fun hv0 ↦ by subst hv0; norm_num at hv)
  · constructor
    · obtain ⟨p1, hp1, hfv1⟩ := h_low
      obtain ⟨p2, hp2, hfv2⟩ := h_high
      use p1, p2, hp1, hp2
      sorry
    · intro p hp
      have h_dist : Metric.infDist p l = |f v p - mid| := by sorry
      rw [h_dist]
      specialize h_all p hp
      cases h_all with
      | inl h =>
        have : mid - f v p ≥ (b - a) / 2 := by rw [mid]; linarith
        rw [abs_sub_comm, abs_of_nonneg (by linarith)]
        calc (1 / 16 : ℝ) * (n : ℝ) ^ (-(1 : ℝ) / 3)
          _ ≤ (b - a) / 2 := by linarith
          _ ≤ mid - f v p := this
      | inr h =>
        have : f v p - mid ≥ (b - a) / 2 := by rw [mid]; linarith
        rw [abs_of_nonneg (by linarith)]
        calc (1 / 16 : ℝ) * (n : ℝ) ^ (-(1 : ℝ) / 3)
          _ ≤ (b - a) / 2 := by linarith
          _ ≤ f v p - mid := this
